div1.entryFree:
Resume, 1) to take again, to take back: Cor. IV, 1, 16. Lr. I, 4, 331. Cymb. III, 1, 15. V, 3, 75.
2) to take: nor --s no care of what is to continue, Tim. II, 2, 4 (O. Edd. r. no care). cf. rebate for bate, redeliver for deliver, regreet for greet, repast for past, reprisal for prize etc.
